tagline: You can now connect Lovable hosted apps to your Databricks workspace to query lakehouse data using the REST API and OAuth machine to machine authentication.
what_it_does: You can now connect Lovable hosted apps to your Databricks workspace to query lakehouse data using the REST API and OAuth machine to machine authentication. Lovable is a no code application platform that lets teams build and deploy apps without writing code. With the Databricks integration, Lovable hosted apps can query data stored in your Databricks lakehouse using the Databricks REST API and OAuth machine to machine (M2M) authentication.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now connect Lovable hosted apps to your Databricks workspace to query lakehouse data using the REST API and OAuth machine to machine authentication. Lovable is a no code application platform that lets teams build and deploy apps without writing code.
key_takeaway: You can now connect Lovable hosted apps to your Databricks workspace to query lakehouse data using the REST API and OAuth machine to machine authentication.
